intended_use: The primary function of ARTAssistant is to facilitate image processing with image registration and synthetic CT (sCT) generation in adaptive radiation therapy. This enables users to meticulously desig
intended_use_full: The primary function of ARTAssistant is to facilitate image processing with image registration and synthetic CT (sCT) generation in adaptive radiation therapy. This enables users to meticulously design ART plans based on the processed images.
target_condition: Cancer patients requiring adaptive radiation therapy (intracranial tumor, nasopharyngeal carcinoma, esophagus cancer, lung cancer, liver cancer, cervical cancer)
ground_truth: For rigid/deformable registration: comparison against predicate device K221706 using NMI and HD metrics; For image conversion: TG119 methodology using gamma analysis comparing RTDose with sRTDose; Dice similarity coefficient comparing ROI segmentation results on CBCT/MR against sCT
other_metrics: Rigid Registration: Normalized Mutual Information (NMI) and Hausdorff Distance (HD) showed non-inferiority compared to predicate device (K221706); Deformable Registration: NMI and HD showed non-inferiority compared to predicate device; Image Conversion: Gamma Pass Rate within acceptable range of AAPM TG-119; Dice similarity coefficient for geometric accuracy of synthetic CT images met requirements
